/: RuckTalk is a podcast for entrepreneur dads about tactical living — clarity, presence, and the daily choices that compound into the life you actually want.
/about/: RuckTalk is hosted by Mike Johnson — entrepreneur, father, and operator. Interviews and field notes for men carrying a heavy ruck.
/training/: Free 8-week tactical living plan for the entrepreneur dad. Built around presence, performance, and recovery.
/blog/: Field notes, frameworks, and episode breakdowns from RuckTalk — for the operator who is also a father.
